## We use technology to protect platform integrity, but we don't fact-check reviews

While we don't verify specific claims because reviewers' opinions are their own, we may label reviews as "Verified" when we can confirm a business interaction took place. Read more

We recognise we may not catch everything, and you can flag anything you think we may have missed. Read more

## Review summary

Based on reviews, created with AI

Reviewers overwhelmingly had a great experience with this company. Customers consistently praise the exceptional quality of both their products and repair services, often noting the invisible and meticulous craftsmanship that makes items look new again. People frequently highlight the excellent value for money, especially given the high quality of the cashmere and the affordability of repairs compared to buying new. The staff receives high marks for their professionalism, helpfulness, and clear communication, contributing to a truly personal and friendly service. Consumers also appreciate the prompt and beautifully packaged deliveries, as well as the company's commitment to sustainability. While most repairs are described as invisible, some customers noted that for very delicate materials like silk blends, a minor repair might be visible, though still expertly done and color-matched.See more

We care about you, our customers, our guests. Welcome! We provide easy-to-access Customer Support options and we are obsessed with providing excellent service to all of our guests. We live in our customers' shoes and are willing to go the extra mile for you!

Exceptional People. Exceptional Service.SecondSale.com is your local neighborhood bookstore with an online presence. We are heavily ingrained in our community, and our staff of hundreds work tirelessly every day, 7 days a week and nearly 365 days a year, to provide the best service and products for our customers across the country.

#### Why Pay For Shipping?

We offer free standard shipping in the continental US!

We offer free standard shipping in the continental US on orders over $10! For order totals less than $10 and expedited shipping options, applicable charges will be shown during checkout.
